title: neurocarpaea lanceolata
intro: Neurocarpaea lanceolata, also known as lance-leaved neurocarpaea, is a plant species in the family Gentianaceae. It is a perennial plant native to New Caledonia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains bioactive compounds such as iridoids and flavonoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, contributing to its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Neurocarpaea lanceolata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
